mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alarm_preference (member_id, sos_preference, announce_preference, is_alarm, alarm_start_time, alarm_end_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{sosPreference}, #{announcePreference}, #{isAlarm}, #{alarmStartTime}, #{alarmEndTime})
insert into notification (member_id, title, content, noti_type, is_read) values (#{p.memberId}, #{p.title}, #{p.content}, #{p.notiType}, 0)
